args: $ErrorActionPreference = "Stop"; $pluginDll = "${config:embyPluginDllPath}"; $destDir = Split-Path $pluginDll -Parent; $srcDll = "${workspaceFolder}/Emby.Plugin.AnimeThemesSync/bin/Debug/net8.0/Emby.Plugin.AnimeThemesSync.dll"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $destDir -Force | Out-Null; Copy-Item $srcDll -Destination $pluginDll -Force; if (-not (Test-Path $pluginDll)) { throw "Missing plugin after copy: $pluginDll" }

$ErrorActionPreference = "Stop"; $networkPath = Join-Path "${config:jellyfinTestyDataDir}" "config/network.xml"; $configDir = Split-Path $networkPath -Parent; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $configDir -Force | Out-Null; if (Test-Path $networkPath) { [xml]$xml = Get-Content $networkPath } else { [xml]$xml = '<NetworkConfiguration xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"><BaseUrl /><EnableHttps>false</EnableHttps><RequireHttps>false</RequireHttps><InternalHttpPort>8096</InternalHttpPort><InternalHttpsPort>8920</InternalHttpsPort><PublicHttpPort>8096</PublicHttpPort><PublicHttpsPort>8920</PublicHttpsPort></NetworkConfiguration>' }; $root = $xml.NetworkConfiguration; foreach ($name in @('InternalHttpPort','PublicHttpPort','InternalHttpsPort','PublicHttpsPort')) { if (-not $root.SelectSingleNode($name)) { $node = $xml.CreateElement($name); [void]$root.AppendChild($node) } }; $root.InternalHttpPort = "${config:jellyfinTestyHttpPort}"; $root.PublicHttpPort = "${config:jellyfinTestyHttpPort}"; $root.InternalHttpsPort = "${config:jellyfinTestyHttpsPort}"; $root.PublicHttpsPort = "${config:jellyfinTestyHttpsPort}"; $xml.Save($networkPath); Write-Host "Jellyfin Testy HTTP port set to ${config:jellyfinTestyHttpPort}."

python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
import xml.etree.ElementTree as ET
network = Path('${config:jellyfinLinuxDataDir}') / 'config' / 'network.xml'
network.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
if network.exists():
    tree = ET.parse(network)
    root = tree.getroot()
else:
    root = ET.Element('NetworkConfiguration')
    tree = ET.ElementTree(root)
for name, value in {'InternalHttpPort':'${config:jellyfinTestyHttpPort}','PublicHttpPort':'${config:jellyfinTestyHttpPort}','InternalHttpsPort':'${config:jellyfinTestyHttpsPort}','PublicHttpsPort':'${config:jellyfinTestyHttpsPort}'}.items():
    node = root.find(name)
    if node is None:
        node = ET.SubElement(root, name)
    node.text = str(value)
tree.write(network, encoding='utf-8', xml_declaration=True)
print('Jellyfin Testy HTTP port set to ${config:jellyfinTestyHttpPort}.')
PY

$argsList = @('--datadir','${config:jellyfinTestyDataDir}','--cachedir','${config:jellyfinTestyCacheDir}','--ffmpeg','${config:jellyfinFfmpegExe}'); Start-Process -FilePath "${config:jellyfinServerExe}" -WorkingDirectory "${config:jellyfinServerCwd}" -ArgumentList $argsList -WindowStyle Hidden; Write-Host "Jellyfin Testy started at http://localhost:${config:jellyfinTestyHttpPort}"

$targets = Get-Process -Name jellyfin -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; foreach ($p in $targets) { try { Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force -ErrorAction Stop } catch { Write-Warning ("Could not stop process {0} (PID {1}). Continuing." -f $p.ProcessName, $p.Id) } }; exit 0

$targets = Get-Process -Name EmbyServer, embytray -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; foreach ($p in $targets) { try { Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force -ErrorAction Stop } catch { Write-Warning ("Could not stop process {0} (PID {1}). Continuing." -f $p.ProcessName, $p.Id) } }; exit 0

Write-Host ""; Write-Host "===== Build Outputs =====" -ForegroundColor Cyan; $jf = "${workspaceFolder}/Jellyfin.Plugin.AnimeThemesSync/bin/Debug/net9.0/Jellyfin.Plugin.AnimeThemesSync.dll"; $emby = "${workspaceFolder}/Emby.Plugin.AnimeThemesSync/bin/Debug/net8.0/Emby.Plugin.AnimeThemesSync.dll"; $shared = "${workspaceFolder}/AnimeThemesSync.Shared/bin/Debug/netstandard2.1/AnimeThemesSync.Shared.dll"; Write-Host ("[Shared ] " + $shared); Write-Host ("[Jellyfin] " + $jf); Write-Host ("[Emby   ] " + $emby); Write-Host ""; Write-Host "===== Deploy Target =====" -ForegroundColor Cyan; Write-Host ("[Jellyfin Testy] ${config:jellyfinTestyDataDir}/plugins/${config:pluginName}"); Write-Host ("[Emby DLL ] ${config:embyPluginDllPath}");

echo; echo '===== Build Outputs ====='; echo '[Shared ] ${workspaceFolder}/AnimeThemesSync.Shared/bin/Debug/netstandard2.1/AnimeThemesSync.Shared.dll'; echo '[Jellyfin] ${workspaceFolder}/Jellyfin.Plugin.AnimeThemesSync/bin/Debug/net9.0/Jellyfin.Plugin.AnimeThemesSync.dll'; echo '[Emby   ] ${workspaceFolder}/Emby.Plugin.AnimeThemesSync/bin/Debug/net8.0/Emby.Plugin.AnimeThemesSync.dll'; echo; echo '===== Deploy Target ====='; echo '[Jellyfin Linux] ${config:jellyfinLinuxDataDir}/plugins/${config:pluginName}'; echo '[Emby DLL ] ${config:embyPluginDllPath}'

$pluginsRoot = "${config:jellyfinTestyDataDir}/plugins"; $src = "${workspaceFolder}/Jellyfin.Plugin.AnimeThemesSync/bin/Debug/net9.0/Jellyfin.Plugin.AnimeThemesSync.dll"; $versioned = Get-ChildItem $pluginsRoot -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Name -like 'AnimeThemesSync_*' } | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 1; if ($versioned) { $dest = $versioned.FullName } else { $dest = Join-Path $pluginsRoot "${config:pluginName}"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $dest -Force | Out-Null }; Copy-Item $src -Destination (Join-Path $dest "Jellyfin.Plugin.AnimeThemesSync.dll") -Force; Write-Host ("Copied to: " + $dest)
